title: Adaptation

content.question: What's one thing you kept doing because it worked last year, but isn't now?
sop: List the 3 strategies, offers, or habits that have been unchanged for over 6 months.
For each, rate your Adaptation Speed and the market's Change Speed 1-10 (see calculation, page 4)
Flag anything where Change Speed is outpacing your Adaptation Speed.
Update the flagged system this month, don't wait for it to fully break first.
Set a recurring 90-day check to re-run this audit.
questions: What's one thing you kept doing because it worked last year, but isn't now?
What assumption is your current strategy built on that hasn't been true for the last six months?
Which competitor or market shift are you still reacting to instead of already ahead of?
content.equation_example: Rate Adaptation Speed 1-10 and Change Speed 1-10. Adaptation Speed 6 divided by Change Speed 8 equals 0.75. Above 1.0 means you're adapting faster than the environment is changing, you gain ground. Below 1.0 means the world is outpacing you and you're quietly falling behind.
content.closing_statement: What worked last year is not evidence for this year.

caption:
Principle Nº 128: Adaptation

Systems must evolve.

Ask yourself: What's one thing you kept doing because it worked last year, but isn't now?
